steps.title: Read the vertex
steps.content:
The function is in vertex form:
$$
f(x)=\frac{1}{9}(x-6)^2+3
$$
So the vertex is $(6,3)$. The $x$-value is time in seconds, and the $y$-value is height in inches.

steps.title: Interpret the minimum
steps.content: Because $\frac{1}{9}>0$, the parabola opens upward, so the vertex is the lowest point. Its height coordinate is $3$, meaning the toy car's minimum height was $3$ inches above the ground. The answer is A.
